description: A vulnerability classified as critical was found in PHPGurukul Online Banquet Booking System 1.0. Affected by this vulnerability is an unknown functionality of the file /admin/booking-search.php. The manipulation of the argument searchdata leads to sql injection. The attack can be launched remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.
